input.company_context: Earleads — GTM engineering for B2B SaaS. ICP: Series A-B founders running outbound themselves.
input.hypothesis: Founders care about cutting CAC by ditching SDR teams in favor of GTM agents.

variants.hook: We fired our 3-person SDR team and replaced them with 2 agents. Here's the math.
variants.rationale: Founder peer-to-peer narrative outperforms vendor pitch on LinkedIn

variants.angle: Cold reframe: SDR is a 1990s job
variants.hook: The SDR role was invented in 1995. It still hasn't been redesigned.
variants.rationale: Provocative framing that stops the scroll

variants.hook: Our 4-tool outbound stack costs $500/mo and replaces $40k/quarter in SDR salary.
variants.rationale: Tool-stack transparency is a high-trust signal in our segment
